title: 44 Pcs Mini Canvas and Easel, Small Canvas Painting Set Includes 4x4 Inches Canvases, Paint Brushes, Paint Palette and Acrylfarben, Wooden Mini Easels with Art Canvases for Kids and Artists Art Party
features: 【44 Pcs Canvas and Easel Set】: You will get 8pcs easels, 8pcs mini canvas, 12pcs 12ml acrylic paints, 5pcs flat tip brushes, 5pcs pointed tip brushes, 3pcs plum palettes, 3pcs 4-hole palettes, the mini canvas easel set meets your painting needs, you don't have to find and buy extra, saving you time.

【Mini Size】: Mini canvas measures 10 x 10cm/4 x 4in and the easel measures 15 x 8cm/5.9 x 3.14in, which is compact, lightweight and easy to carry, and mini canvas and easel can be folded flat for easy storage without taking up too much display space.

【Solid Wood Materials】: The mini easel is made of high quality solid wood material, waterproof and moisture-proof, dust-proof and dirt-proof, the surface is finely polished, smooth and flat, no burrs, not easy to be deformed, it can display your paintings perfectly and can be used for a long time, mini canvas is made of canvas, easy to paint, good at presenting the true colours of the paints, it's the best choice for using acrylics, oil paints, watercolours, sequins and stickers.

【Enjoy Happy Hour】: The easel with mini canvas can be used to organise small DIY painting activities, where parents and children can use their imagination and creativity to complete DIY artworks together, mini canvas painting set lets you experience the fun of painting and bonding.

【Widely Application】: Canvas painting stand kit is suitable for daily drawing, oil or acrylic painting, craft projects, art classes, home decor or displaying pictures, business cards, wedding decorations and so on, our mini easels with art canvas is perfect for anyone and makes a great gift for friends, kids and family.
description: Product Description Warm Tips: The size of the canvas is 10 x 10cm, please pay attention to the size information before purchasing, thank you for your understanding.
